items.title: Boulder County Business Hall of Fame announces 2026 inductees
items.summary: The Boulder County Business Hall of Fame announced its 2026 class of inductees, recognizing seven business leaders and entrepreneurs who have shaped the region's economy and community. Honorees include Sandy and Sally Bracken (higher education and philanthropy), Gerry Agnes (Elevations Credit Union), Rich Lopez (city planning and civic leadership), Rene and Maria Cervantes (La Mariposa restaurant), Denis Nock (entrepreneurship and business development), and Becky Callan-Gamble and Dean Callan (commercial real estate). The induction ceremony will be held on September 30, 2026.
